title: polygala subcollina
intro: Polygala subcollina is a plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family and is commonly known as Chinese forked beard or forked beard, due to its forked stamens resembling a beard. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Polygala subcollina include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
